name: dnd-recap
description: dnd-recap. Rolling session summary — compresses old conversation history into dense narrative summaries injected at the top of every prompt. Solves the 'lost in the middle' attention problem for local LLMs.
author: Leona (Zeebie), with the help of Remmi for debugging

schedule.name: Recap Compressor
schedule.description: Compresses raw session events into tight LLM-written summaries every 5 minutes. Safe LLM call — runs outside of any chat turn.
